case_title: JAMES BAXTER VS. FIREFLY SALES & TRADING COMPANY,LLC, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAXTER, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT FIREFLY SALES & TRADING COMPANY,LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAXTER, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIREFLY SALES & TRADING COMPANY,LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC $2,176.16 PRINCIPAL, $.18 INTEREST, $151.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,327.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
